dealerText: Thanks for your interest in the 2025 Honda CR-V Hybrid Sport Touring in Meteorite Grey! Great news — we can do this one at $41,500 out the door. That includes our $800 doc fee and $100 DMV/tag. MSRP is $42,150 so you're getting $2,750 off sticker. Ready to lock it in this week? — Derek

Hi! Here's our best number on the 2025 CR-V Touring. Selling price $39,350. Combined doc/processing fees $685. With title, registration, and CA sales tax you're looking at $43,091 out the door. We include a lifetime powertrain limited warranty. Let me know when you can come in — Marcus

Good morning — here's the breakdown on the 2025 CR-V Hybrid Sport you asked about. Selling price $36,305. Doc fee $699. Taxes and DMV bring you to $40,432.78 out the door. This reflects a $895 discount from MSRP. Happy to walk through it over the phone.

Quote on the 2025 CR-V EX-L in Platinum White Pearl — we can go $39,100 OTD. Selling $37,505, doc fee is $799, plus MD title/tags and 6% sales tax. That's $800 under MSRP. Vehicle is in stock now, ready to deliver. — Paul

Here's where we landed on the 2025 RAV4 XLE Premium Hybrid in Blueprint. $40,500 out the door — that's selling at $37,650, $150 doc, and the rest is TX sales tax, title, and inventory tax. No dealer add-ons, no protection packages. Straight deal. Let me know if this works.

Thanks for reaching out about the RAV4 LE! Bottom line is $37,500 OTD. That's selling at $34,100 (MSRP is $35,305), doc fee $499, plus AZ state tax, title, and registration. In stock, can deliver this weekend. — Tanya at Phoenix Toyota

Lease numbers on the 2025 RAV4 Prime SE: 36 months / 10k miles. Cap cost $45,100, MSRP $46,380. Acquisition fee $650, our doc fee is only $129. Drive-off with first payment, registration, and MA sales tax runs about $3,500. Monthly $489. Clean deal — no bank fees beyond the acquisition.

Here's the out-the-door on the 2025 Explorer ST 4WD in Agate Black. Selling price $57,495. Administrative/doc fee $585. That's $58,080 before tax — MO collects sales tax at titling, so you'll handle that at the DMV. $3,500 under MSRP. Ready when you are — Kyle

vehicle: 2024 Toyota Grand Highlander Hybrid MAX Platinum
dealerText: We have one Grand Highlander Hybrid MAX Platinum inbound and yes it is available. Current market conditions require an $8,000 market adjustment on this trim — selling price is $66,500. Doc fee $85 (CA cap). OTD with tax, title, and license is approximately $73,200. We also include a $1,995 protection package. Reserve today with a $2,000 deposit.

Update on your F-150 Lightning Lariat order. The vehicle has arrived but there's been a market adjustment applied by the dealer group — $9,995 over the original MSRP. New selling price is $89,990. Doc fee $250. With TX tax, title, and inventory tax your out-the-door is $98,750. Please confirm by Friday or we'll release the allocation. — Regional Sales
